name: Violet Frost
description:
Violet Frost is a tall, broad and fat Auroricorn mare. She has a deep violet coat with a silvery white mane with silver tips and sparkles all over the mane. Violet has dark purple eyebrows and her coat transitions into blue at the fetlocks which is also sparkly.

Being an Auroricorn, she has crystal hooves and horn. She wears a bead necklace with many differently shaped crystal on it. Around her horn she has a star shaped crystal on it, with a smaller star shaped crystal hanging from it.

She is a friendly, caring individual, as is more than happy to greet the Mane Six (G5) She takes a leader role, keeping the other Auroricorns calm with her flute. She can be a bit nervous and unsure of herself at times, despite the Mane 6 reassuring her.
creator: JDPon3
